help-info:
❓ Help

Select a section to learn more about the bot:
help-how-to-use-text:
📖 HOW TO USE LOOKORA

🚀 GETTING STARTED
1. Click «Get Started» in the main menu
2. Choose analysis type: appearance or style
3. Follow instructions and send a photo
4. Get detailed analysis with recommendations

📸 APPEARANCE RATING
• Send a front face photo
• Then a side profile photo
• Get ratings on 8 parameters
• Order personalized tips

👔 STYLE RATING
• Choose context (work, date, etc.)
• Send a full body photo
• Get outfit analysis and recommendations

💬 COMMANDS
/start - Main menu
/wallet - Balance and top-up
/help - This help
/language - Change language
help-appearance-text:
👤 ABOUT APPEARANCE RATING

📊 RATING PARAMETERS
We analyze 8 key parameters:
• 👁‍🗨 Eyes — shape, expressiveness
• 👃 Nose — proportions, shape
• 💋 Lips — shape, fullness
• ✨ Skin — condition, tone
• 🦴 Jawline — line, shape
• 💆 Cheekbones — prominence
• ⚖️ Symmetry — feature balance
• 🎶 Harmony — overall impression

🎯 IMPRESSION COEFFICIENT
A multiplier (×0.5 - ×1.0) reflecting overall impression.

💎 LOOKSMAX RATING
After analysis, discover your tier on the looksmax scale:

👑💎 GIGACHAD (90-100) — Top 1%, genetic jackpot
🔥💪 CHAD (80-89) — Top 5%, very attractive
✨😎 CHADLITE (70-79) — Top 15%, above average
👍😊 HTN (60-69) — High Tier Normie
😐👤 MTN (50-59) — Mid Tier Normie
😕📉 LTN (40-49) — Low Tier Normie
😢⚠️ SUBHUMAN (<40) — Below average

💡 Improvement tips are FREE!
help-battle-text:
⚔️ ABOUT APPEARANCE BATTLES

🎮 WHAT IS IT?
Appearance battle is a comparison of two people on appearance parameters. Perfect for competing with friends!

💰 COST: 100 coins

📸 HOW IT WORKS:
1️⃣ Send front photo of FIRST participant
2️⃣ Send side photo of FIRST participant
3️⃣ Send front photo of SECOND participant
4️⃣ Send side photo of SECOND participant

🏆 RESULT:
• Comparison on 8 parameters
• Overall scores for each
• Winner determination
• Verdict with explanation

⚠️ IMPORTANT:
This is entertainment! Don't take results too seriously.
help-style-text:
👔 ABOUT STYLE RATING

📊 RATING PARAMETERS
We analyze 6 key parameters:
• 🎨 Color harmony — shade combinations
• 👔 Fit — how clothes fit
• 🎯 Style consistency — outfit coherence
• 💎 Accessories — appropriateness
• 🌡️ Seasonality — weather match
• 🎭 Context — situation appropriateness

🎯 CONTEXT COEFFICIENT
This multiplier (×0.3 - ×1.0) shows how well the outfit fits the chosen context:

🌟 ×1.0 — Perfect match
✨ ×0.85 — Good match
👍 ×0.7 — Acceptable
😐 ×0.5 — Weak match
⚠️ ×0.3 — Poor match

Example: beachwear at a wedding gets a low coefficient.
help-coins-text:
🪙 ABOUT LOOK COINS

💎 WHAT ARE THEY?
Look coins are the bot's internal currency for services.

💰 SERVICE COSTS
• Appearance rating: 50 coins
• Improvement tips: 25 coins
• Style rating: 50 coins

🎁 STARTING BONUS
• On registration you get 100 coins!
• 50 base + 50 bonus
• Enough for 2 full analyses

⚠️ IMPORTANT: PHOTO VALIDATION
Coins are charged ONLY after successful photo validation!

✅ FREE ATTEMPTS
• 3 validation errors per day — free
• If photo is incorrect, you can try again without losing coins

💥 PAID ERRORS
• After the 3rd error: 10 coins charged per invalid photo
• Monitor photo quality to avoid losses!

💳 TOP-UP
• Top up via CryptoBot
• Top up via Telegram Stars

✨ BONUSES
Bigger packages mean higher coin bonuses!
agreement-text:
📜 LOOKORA LICENSE AGREEMENT

1️⃣ GENERAL PROVISIONS
By using Lookora bot, you agree to these terms.

2️⃣ ENTERTAINMENT PURPOSE
⚠️ IMPORTANT: All appearance and style ratings are for ENTERTAINMENT purposes only and do not constitute professional advice.

Analysis results:
• Are generated automatically
• Are not medical assessments
• Do not claim objectivity
• Are intended for entertainment only

3️⃣ AGE RESTRICTIONS
🔞 This service is for users 18 years and older ONLY.

❌ STRICTLY PROHIBITED to upload photos of minors.

4️⃣ PRIVACY
🔒 We do not store your photos on our servers. All photos are processed in real-time and deleted immediately after analysis.

5️⃣ DISCLAIMER
Bot administration:
• Is not responsible for emotional reactions to results
• Does not guarantee accuracy
• Reserves the right to change terms

6️⃣ CONSENT
By clicking «Accept», you confirm:
• You are 18 years or older
• You understand the entertainment nature of the service
• You will not upload photos of minors
• You accept all agreement terms

hair-analyzing: 💭 Analyzing your hair and determining face shape...
help-hair-text:
💇 ABOUT HAIR RATING

📊 RATING PARAMETERS
We analyze 6 key hair parameters:
• 💊 Health - condition, shine, no damage
• 🎈 Volume - fullness and thickness
• ✨ Texture - structure and quality
• 🎨 Color - natural or coloring quality
• 💇 Styling - neatness and style
• 🧴 Maintenance - overall look and care

👤 FACE SHAPE
We determine your face shape (oval, round, square, etc.), important for hairstyle selection.

💡 HAIRSTYLE SUGGESTION
• Get a recommended perfect hairstyle
• Learn why it suits you
• Get search examples online
• Generate barber instructions

✨ IMPROVEMENT
Get tips to improve your current hairstyle:
• Treatments (keratin, biowave)
• Styling changes (curls, waves)
• Coloring options
• Care advice
